name: scaffold
description: >- Project-aware file generation. Reads existing codebase conventions (naming, structure, imports, exports, test patterns) then generates new files that match exactly. Wires generated files into the project's registration points.
author: SethGammon
summary_zh: 它是个懂你项目规范的代码生成器，能自动识别现有代码风格，一键生成完全匹配的新文件并接入项目，免去手写样板代码和手动注册的繁琐，适合频繁新建模块的开发场景。
